results.rendered_html:
anuvidhāyin a.
1 Obedient, submissive, compliant, conforming to orders; sā strī yānuvidhāyinī  H. 2. 141 ; bhavitavyānuvidhāyīnīṃdriyāṇi  V. 3. 
2 Resembling; nijavadhūśvasitānuvidhāyini  Śi. 6. 23 , 15. 96.
